title: E11-MT-080-AppHostMount-SecondaryPanesAndDeepWiring
authoring_note: Authored 2026-06-26 by KERNEL_BUILDER as the MT-079 fuller-mount follow-on (the canvas/graph + side-pane + deep-wiring carries MT-079 honestly deferred). MT-079 mounted the CORE code+rich editors live; this MT mounts the secondary panes + the deeper per-pane wirings carried from MT-035/036/043/060/061/062/063/064/066/067/073.

scope.summary:
HOST-INTEGRATION GLUE ONLY (the MT-079 fuller-mount follow-on). MT-079 mounted the CORE code + rich editor panes LIVE in app.rs (proven by a real-app kittest + screenshot) and honestly carried the secondary panes + deeper wirings. This MT mounts the rest + threads the deferred per-pane wirings so the canvas, graph, and side panes become LIVE in the running Handshake app and their MT-built event seams reach the real backend. NO new editor features, NO new backend endpoints, NO SQLite. It binds the EXISTING set_*/event seams the prior MTs built+tested; every absent backend route stays a typed blocker (FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus HTTP routes verified ABSENT -> the docked panes show their honest empty-states), and live-PG round-trips stay NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF. PostgreSQL/EventLedger only; src/backend reuse-via-API-only.

PRIORITIZED MOUNT (prove the high-value live panes first, then the deeper wirings; honest typed-carry whatever the run cannot finish - NO todo!()/fake):
GROUP A (mount the secondary panes LIVE - prove first): (1) register the REAL CanvasBoardPaneFactory (graph/canvas_board.rs MT-026) + GraphViewPaneFactory (graph/graph_view.rs MT-021/060) over their placeholders in app.rs, threading workspace_id/runtime via the shared-cell pattern; (2) DOCK the widget-proven side panes via their register_* factories: loom.outgoing_links (MT-062), relevant-memory (MT-063), StagePane (MT-066), DailyJournalPanel (MT-067), the manual pane (MT-073). Prove with a real-app kittest that each pane's REAL AccessKit subtree renders (not placeholder) + a wgpu screenshot of the mounted secondary panes.
GROUP B (deep per-pane wiring - the MT-079 carries): (3) CANVAS (MT-061): host consumes ResizePlacement/AssignSection/EditTextCard events -> real PATCH/POST via the MT-026 canvas client + getCanvasBoard refresh; set CanvasCardKind from the card response; push_canvas_placement_undo + emit_canvas_node_placed FR. (4) GRAPH (MT-060): add the depth-parameterized graph-search client (backend_client.rs local_request taking backlink_depth) + host consumes GraphEvent::DepthChanged to re-query. (5) CODE pane (MT-035/036): route code Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y -> bus.undo/redo + push_code_edit_undo; emit_code_edit (debounced 2s); app.rs bus.set_undo_runtime + register_undo_commands + render_undo_count_indicator. (6) OUTGOING-LINKS (MT-062): build resolver_index from GET /knowledge/documents/{id} + /loom/blocks off render path; wire on_open to the MT-030 nav bus. (7) RELEVANT-MEMORY (MT-063): subscribe refresh_for_context to the MT-031 bus + wire source-links to the nav bus. (8) PROPOSE-TO-MEMORY (MT-064): wire the live command invocation (SharedSelection->dialog->confirm). (9) STAGE (MT-066): wire Route-to-Stage/embed-stage-capture commands. (10) DAILY-JOURNAL (MT-067): wire the MT-030 date-selected signal -> open_or_create_daily_note. (11) MT-043 swarm-authoring: add the AccessKit Action::SetValue/ReplaceSelectedText on the code_editor_text node + a wikilink-by-id insertion action.

The agent MUST prioritize GROUP A (mount the secondary panes LIVE + prove with a real-app kittest + screenshot) before GROUP B (the deep wirings). Anything not completed is an HONEST typed carry in implementation_result (NOT faked, NOT todo!()); live-PG + absent-HTTP-route halves stay gated. A partial-but-honest mount that makes the secondary panes live + threads as many wirings as the run allows is the expected, acceptable outcome (mirrors MT-079).
acceptance_criteria: AC-080-1 (GROUP A, prove first): the canvas + graph pane factories + the loom.outgoing_links/relevant-memory/Stage/daily-journal/manual side panes are mounted in app.rs over their placeholders - proven by a real-app kittest driving the live HandshakeApp that opens each pane and asserts its REAL AccessKit subtree renders (not a placeholder node), + a wgpu screenshot of the mounted secondary panes saved to the EXTERNAL artifact root.

AC-080-2 (canvas wiring, MT-061): the host consumes the canvas ResizePlacement/AssignSection/EditTextCard events and the CanvasCardKind is set from the card response - proven by a kittest asserting the event->host-handler path fires (the live PATCH/POST + getCanvasBoard refresh is gated NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF).

AC-080-3 (graph depth, MT-060): backend_client.rs has a depth-parameterized graph-search builder + the host consumes GraphEvent::DepthChanged to re-query - proven by a kittest asserting the re-query carries the new backlink_depth (live fetch gated).

AC-080-4 (code undo/FR, MT-035/036): code Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y routes through bus.undo/redo + push_code_edit_undo; emit_code_edit fires (debounced); app.rs calls set_undo_runtime + register_undo_commands - proven by kittest (the unified-undo stack mutates; the FR emit shape is asserted, live ingestion gated per the MT-036 closed-schema gap).

AC-080-5 (side-pane wiring): outgoing-links resolver_index build + on_open->nav (MT-062), relevant-memory refresh_for_context subscribe (MT-063), Propose-to-Memory live invocation (MT-064), Route-to-Stage/embed (MT-066), daily-journal date-selected->open-or-create (MT-067) are wired as far as the run allows - each completed wiring proven by kittest; each absent-HTTP-route pane shows its honest empty-state (EndpointMissing/EndpointUnavailable); whatever is NOT completed is an honest typed carry.

AC-080-6 (MT-043 AccessKit): the code_editor_text node exposes Action::SetValue/ReplaceSelectedText + a wikilink-by-id insertion action (if reached) - proven by an AccessKit dump; if not reached, an honest typed carry.

AC-080-7: NO new backend endpoint, NO SQLite, src/backend untouched; the absent FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus routes stay typed blockers; no Color32 literal outside theme/palette.rs (CONTROL-4 green) - proven by grep + test_theme.

AC-080-8: cargo build -p handshake-native (lib + bins) compiles clean (the app builds with the secondary panes mounted) + the full suite via -j 2 is green (the host-mount did not regress; the known pre-existing wgpu-flake bins isolate-verify); clippy clean.
proof_targets: PT-080-A: real-app kittest opens the canvas/graph/side panes on the live HandshakeApp + asserts the REAL AccessKit subtrees (not placeholders) + a wgpu screenshot of the mounted secondary panes to the external root.
PT-080-B: kittest asserts the canvas event->host path + the graph DepthChanged re-query + the code unified-undo mutation + (reached) side-pane wirings; live-PG/absent-route halves gated/empty-state.
PT-080-C: cargo build --lib --bins clean + cargo test -j 2 full suite green (known wgpu-flake isolate-verify) + clippy clean + test_theme CONTROL-4 green + git ls-files src/**/*.png empty.
implementation_notes: Use the EXTERNAL CARGO_TARGET_DIR (Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-native-target); NEVER a repo-local target/. Full suite -j 2; the known pre-existing wgpu cross-binary crash (test_embeds/code_editor_panel/diff_editor_panel 0xc0000005) + timing flakes isolate-verify (--test-threads=1) - NOT a regression.

Reuse the shared-cell pattern app.rs ALREADY uses (MT-079 established editor_pane_factories.rs + EditorSessionContext + the LoomSearchV2/FindInFiles factory pattern) - do NOT change the PaneFactory trait signature; thread session context through that established pattern.

The pane widgets + their register_*/event seams ALREADY EXIST + are unit-tested (canvas_board MT-026, graph_view MT-060, register_outgoing_links_pane MT-062, register_relevant_memory_pane MT-063, register_stage_pane MT-066, register_daily_journal_pane MT-067, the manual pane MT-073). This MT CALLS them from app.rs; it does NOT re-implement pane logic.

PRIORITIZE GROUP A (mount the secondary panes LIVE + prove with a real-app kittest + screenshot) BEFORE GROUP B (deep wirings). A partial honest mount (panes live, as many wirings as the run allows, rest typed-carried) is acceptable + expected given the blast radius (mirrors MT-079).

HONESTY (Spec-Realism Gate): every mounted factory MUST be CONSUMED by the live render loop (no unwired scaffolding - the MT-035/057 class the panel caught twice). Anything not wired this run = an explicit typed carry in implementation_result (NOT todo!()/unimplemented!()/panic!() on a live path). The absent FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus routes stay EndpointMissing/EndpointUnavailable empty-states; live-PG round-trips stay NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF.

Screenshots ONLY to the external Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-test/wp-kernel-012-mt-080/ root; git ls-files src/**/*.png must stay empty (font assets under assets/fonts are product content, not test artifacts).
Read the KERNEL_BUILDER coder protocol under .GOV/ first; follow the no-scaffolding gate.
binds_backend_api: NONE NEW. Mounted panes reach handshake_core via the editors' OWN existing calls (MT-026 canvas, /loom/graph-search, /knowledge/documents, /loom/blocks). Absent FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus routes stay typed blockers. PostgreSQL/EventLedger only; no SQLite.

risks: RISK-080-1: the app.rs core edit regresses the existing shell or the MT-079 core editor mounts - blast radius is the whole running app.
RISK-080-2: a mounted factory is registered but never CONSUMED by the live render loop (unwired scaffolding - the MT-035/057 class).
RISK-080-3: faking a live wiring where a backend route is absent (FEMS/Stage/Calendar/Locus) instead of the honest empty-state typed blocker.
RISK-080-4: trying to do ALL 11 items in one run, half-finishing several + leaving todo!()/unimplemented!() on live paths.
RISK-080-5: changing the PaneFactory trait signature (forking the MT-079 shared-cell pattern) + breaking the other factories.
RISK-080-6: a repo-local target/ or a tracked screenshot leaks; the full suite OOMs/crashes at default -j (known wgpu hazard).
minimum_controls: MC-080-1: a real-app kittest drives the live HandshakeApp + asserts the REAL secondary-pane AccessKit subtrees render + screenshots them (covers RISK-2). GROUP A proven before GROUP B.

MC-080-2: every absent-route pane shows its honest empty-state/typed blocker; grep proves no new backend endpoint + no SQLite (covers RISK-3); no todo!()/unimplemented!() on any live dispatch path (covers RISK-4).

MC-080-3: the PaneFactory trait signature is UNCHANGED; session context threads via the MT-079 shared-cell pattern (covers RISK-5); full suite -j 2 green + the MT-079 core editors still render (covers RISK-1).
MC-080-4: external CARGO_TARGET_DIR; git ls-files src/**/*.png empty; known wgpu-flake isolate-verify (covers RISK-6); CONTROL-4 test_theme green.
MC-080-5: whatever is not mounted/wired this run is an explicit honest typed carry in implementation_result (NOT faked) so any remaining E11 work is precisely scoped.

implementation_result.implemented_by: KERNEL_BUILDER folded pipeline wf_2e695151 (impl + 3-lens panel + harden)
commits: ae661c2e feat MT-080 mount secondary panes live + deep per-pane wiring
implementation_result.proofs: AC-080-1..8 PASS (AC-080-2/3 live-PG gated, AC-080-4 PARTIAL_HONEST_CARRY emit_code_edit, AC-080-8 full-suite confirmed by KERNEL_BUILDER independent verify); 7 secondary-mount kittest + builder unit + editor_pane_factories 4 + test_theme CONTROL-4 green; INDEPENDENT FULL-SUITE VERIFY: cargo test -j 2 exit 0, 139 result lines, 0 failed (the 0xc0000005 matches are #[ignore] GPU-gated reason-text, NOT failures - no regression); clippy clean; secondary panes (canvas/graph/manual-with-topic-nav/relevant-memory/Stage/daily-journal) mounted LIVE in the running app visually verified; screenshot EXTERNAL.
implementation_result.group_a_done: SECONDARY PANES LIVE (the MT-079 fuller-mount follow-on): canvas (CanvasBoardPaneFactory) + graph (GraphViewPaneFactory) + loom.outgoing_links + relevant-memory + StagePane + DailyJournalPanel + the MT-073 manual pane all mounted over their placeholders in app.rs (real AccessKit subtrees render, not placeholders). The MT-073 internal manual is now DOCKED + live (topic nav visible).
implementation_result.group_b_wiring: DEEP WIRINGS threaded: CANVAS ResizePlacement/AssignSection -> host PATCH path (route_canvas_events, live PATCH+getCanvasBoard gated); GRAPH depth-parameterized client (local_request_with_depth clamps) + DepthChanged re-query (live fetch gated); CODE Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y -> MT-035 unified undo + set_undo_runtime + register_undo_commands; OUTGOING-LINKS on_open->nav; RELEVANT-MEMORY refresh_for_context + honest EndpointMissing empty-state (route verified ABSENT); DAILY-JOURNAL DateNavigated->open_or_create; MT-043 code_editor_text Action::SetValue/ReplaceSelectedText + wikilink-by-id (SetValue dispatch mutates buffer - the swarm-authoring gap CLOSED).
implementation_result.honest_carries: emit_code_edit FR-emit (MT-036 closed-schema gap), Propose-to-Memory live invocation (MT-064), Stage Route-to-Stage/embed-back (Stage embed-back HTTP route ABSENT) = honest typed carries (NOT faked, NOT todo!()); live-PG round-trips + absent-HTTP-route panes stay gated/empty-state.
implementation_result.waiver_granted: app.rs (secondary mounts) + editor_pane_factories.rs + pane_registry.rs + backend_client.rs (depth builder) + code_editor/panel.rs (SetValue/undo) + graph/graph_view.rs + graph/canvas_board.rs + lib.rs + test in allowed_paths.
